case_title: JOHN CHIATELLO VS. JUAN SANDOVAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHIATELLO, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JUAN (DBA) PACIFIC WELDING PACIFIC WELDING CO, INC (AGENT: JERRY FRANK QUINTANA) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO PACIFIC WELDING CO. INC. (AGENT JERRY FRANK QUINTANA) BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-19-2016 AT 1:30 PM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIATELLO, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JUAN (DBA) PACIFIC WELDING $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,075.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST PACIFIC WELDING CO. INC (AGENT JERRY FRANK QUINTANA) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: NONE LISTED. SERVED MAR-01-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC WELDING CO, INC (AGENT: JERRY FRANK QUINTANA)
DECLARATION OF JUNA SANDOVAL RE: ADDRESS UPDATE FILED BY DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JUAN (DBA) PACIFIC WELDING
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JUAN (DBA) PACIFIC WELDING
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: NONE LISTED. SERVED MAR-01-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, JUAN (DBA) PACIFIC WELDING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUAN SANDOVAL DBA PACIFIC WELDING WAS PRESENT. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST PACIFIC WELDING CO. INC. (AGENT JERRY FRANK QUINTANA) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2016 - JUDGMENT.

(SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS [X] THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS;[X] PAYMENTS OF $ 200.00 ON THE 15 DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING JUNE 15, 2016 UNTIL SEP.15,2016 AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT$ 75.00 [X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL PAID IN FULL.
